name: Offset
description: Solid blocks with a hard drop-shadow twin behind them, popping in 2.5-D on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color0); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 26%; top: 26%; @size: 60%; background: var(--color1); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12%; top: 12%; @size: 60%; background: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
